scripts.build: npm run openapi:generate && npm run build:css && hugo --cleanDestinationDir
scripts.start: npm run openapi:generate && concurrently --kill-others --names openapi,tailwind,hugo "npm:openapi:watch" "tailwindcss -i assets/css/main.css -o static/assets/css/style.css --watch" "hugo server --disableFastRender"
